title: POWER Act (Protecting Our Workers and Energy Resources)
sponsor: Sen. Ram Villivalam (S); Rep. Robyn Gabel (H)
key_provision: Clean energy procurement mandates; utilities cannot pass data center costs to ratepayers; 3-mile buffer from overburdened communities; utility assistance fund contributions

title: Data Center Energy and Water Reporting Act
key_provision: All data centers must annually report energy and water consumption to Illinois Power Agency starting Jan 1 2026

title: 2-Year Moratorium on Data Center Tax Incentives
key_provision: 2-year pause on new state tax credits for data centers; reassessment of economic and environmental impacts

title: POWER Act (Protecting Oregonians With Energy Responsibility)
key_provision: Separate rate class for >20MW data centers and crypto miners; mandatory 10-year contracts; full infrastructure cost responsibility; does not apply retroactively

title: Data Center Development & Grid Modernization Act
key_provision: 20-year 100% sales/use tax exemption; $250M minimum investment; 25 FTE jobs; 50% clean energy sourcing; workforce programs; annual compliance reporting

title: Data Center Clean Energy Mandate
key_provision: 100% new renewable energy by 2031; water stewardship rules; impact reviews in disadvantaged communities; community benefits requirements

title: Data Center Energy and Ratepayer Protection
key_provision: 80% renewable energy required for new/expanded data centers; EDCs must develop data center tariffs protecting non-data center ratepayers; incentivize heat recapture

title: Data Center Regulation and Ratepayer Protection
key_provision: Utilities must develop data center tariffs by 2027; annual water/energy/emissions reporting; 80% renewables by 2030 / 100% by 2045; curtailment during grid strain; annual energy fee

title: Microgrid Authorization for Data Centers
key_provision: Allows on-site microgrid power generation for data centers; enables self-generation and sale of electricity

title: Data Center Microgrid Oversight
key_provision: PRC oversight of data center microgrids; phased renewable targets (40% by 2028 / 50% by 2030 / 100% by 2040); annual energy/water reporting

title: Data Center Electric Tariff Reform
key_provision: Requires electric utilities to create special tariffs for data centers; protect ordinary customers from rate increases; incentivize energy efficiency and heat recapture

title: BPU Study on Data Center Ratepayer Impacts
key_provision: Requires BPU to study whether data centers are overburdening ratepayers; concrete action deferred to Jan 2027

title: AI Data Center Clean Energy Requirement
key_provision: Requires future AI data centers and crypto operations to derive all electricity from new clean energy sources; submit comprehensive energy usage plans

title: Eliminating Data Center Tax Incentives
key_provision: DECD barred from accepting new data center tax-exempt applications after July 1 2026; ends 30-year exemption program

title: AI Data Center Energy and Water Efficiency
key_provision: Proposed energy and water efficiency standards for AI data centers; did not pass committee

title: Data Center Energy and Water Usage Reporting
key_provision: Large data centers must report energy/water consumption and power source details; DEEP to set efficiency standards

title: Data Center Program Reform
key_provision: IT tax exemption extended to 35 years; electricity exemption repealed; $2M-$5M annual fees; separate 'very large customer' rate class; PUC approval required; $250M investment threshold; green building certification; water reporting for >100M gal/year

title: Moratorium on Data Centers
key_provision: Complete moratorium on new data centers until planning authority established; mandatory renewable energy; ban on cost pass-through to residents; voter referendum required; ban on NDAs with government

title: Data Center PSC Certification Requirement
key_provision: Data centers using >30MW must obtain PSC certificate; grid capacity assessment; alignment with renewable goals; economic and ratepayer impact review

title: End Data Center Tax Exemptions
key_provision: End Tax Credit Authority ability to award new data center tax exemptions after Oct 1 2025; existing exemptions honored

title: Data Center Sales Tax Exemption Cap
key_provision: Sales tax exemption capped at 7 years for applications after Mar 1 2025; Meta Kuna center grandfathered with permanent exemption

title: Data Center Tax Exemption Reform and Sunset
type: Tax incentive reduction + utility cost recovery
key_provision: All new exemptions sunset July 1 2036; data centers pay full electricity cost; no stacking with property tax incentives; water use notice requirements

title: Large Load Customer Conditions
key_provision: PSC to condition permits on infrastructure cost coverage; require statewide ratepayer benefit demonstration

title: Grid Connection Cost Protections
key_provision: PUC rules ensuring grid connection costs not shifted to other retail customers

title: Eliminate Corporate Tax Credits
key_provision: Eliminate all corporate tax credits (including data center) to fund income tax reduction

title: Emergency Data Center Moratorium
key_provision: Prevent new data center construction until co-location legislation passes; require co-located power generation

title: Off-Grid Electricity Provider
key_provision: Off-grid providers not public utilities; exempt from PUC oversight; lose exemption on grid connection

title: Hyperscale Data Center Moratorium
key_provision: 1-year moratorium on expansion or new hyperscale data center construction

title: Data Center Construction Moratorium
key_provision: Freeze data center construction until July 2030; PUC investigation of environmental/economic impacts
